spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, py-24 for marketing sections.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Tetris grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with overlapping elements.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Dense, highly utilized space.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Cards must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) and use flat solid backgrounds.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp edges or minimal rounding: rounded-none or rounded-sm.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with 1px bottom border border-slate-200/50.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders style: Flat white background, 1px border-slate-200. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg.
surface_strategies.interactive_elements: Neumorphism mix: Sharp 1px border grounded with slight shadow for buttons.

animations.hover: Explicit hover states required for all interactive elements. Example: hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
animations.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.

components_strategy.marketing: Pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Custom asymmetrical grids. Shadcn customized for forms.
components_strategy.dashboard: Shadcn components heavily utilized (Tables, Tabs, Dialogs) but customized with sharp corners and high contrast.
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react for standard elements. Use @phosphor-icons/react if duotone/complex icons are needed.
components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

image_urls.description: Abstract minimal modern architecture white background
Diverse group of students gathered around a laptop
Two individuals engaged in a contactless payment using a QR code scanner at a retail counter

instructions_to_main_agent: Design the landing page focusing on a premium, minimal startup aesthetic with high-contrast typography.
Do not use generic center-aligned blocks for the hero section; use an asymmetrical grid.
For all dashboards (Student, Vendor, Admin), use a compact 'Control Room' layout with sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm) and solid backgrounds (no glassmorphism on dashboards).
Adhere strictly to the color palette: Stark White backgrounds, deep Charcoal/Slate text, and International Klein Blue (#002FA7) as the primary brand action color.
Ensure all buttons and interactive elements include explicit hover and focus states.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page structure to allow creative overlaps, but rely on customized Shadcn components for forms, inputs, and all dashboard widgets.
